chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7974 of 2017 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) For hearing of main case. 27-03-2025 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Rashid Arfi, advocate for respondents No.1 & 2. Mr. Zafar Hussain, advocate for respondent No.3. Ms. Mahreen Ibrahim, D.A.G. This petition is pending since 2017 without any progress. Petitioner is unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
